decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs' already resolves to an existing registry record that represents the same real-world project: M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues in Manhattan. That registry record already includes the observation's source (2011_04_27_brt_1st2nd_cac6) in its source_ids and has the alias 'project_first-second-ave-sbs-2011-04-27'. Per rule, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 Select Bus Service launched October 10, 2010
